Run the **discovery-playbook** skill from **ideation-discovery-skills** (install: `npx skills add eltntawy/ideation-discovery-skills -g -y`).

Validate this software idea end to end (phases 0–7). Propose a topic slug, use `discovery/<slug>/` for artifacts, and stop if a kill gate fails. Do not recommend building until **idea-scorecard** is Strong go (60–75) or Conditional go (45–59).

Use the user's message for the idea, ICP, and constraints.
